title: Active thermal alerts summary
query_text: Are there any active thermal alerts in the cluster right now? Summarize them.

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Yes. Rack B has an active thermal warning: hotspot temperature 72°C, which exceeds the 65°C warning threshold defined in thermal_policy.md. Racks A, C, and D are within normal range (42–48°C hotspot). One incident record (INC-2026-038) is open for Rack B thermal monitoring. No critical threshold (85°C) has been breached.
